channel.title: Govt Website Change Alerts
channel.description: Automated change detection for monitored government websites

item.title: Department of Telecommunications (DoT): 2 new text blocks
item.description:
2 new text blocks
New text: Extension of administrative frequency assignment dated 08.07.2026 | Transfers / Postings in the Junior Administrative Grade and below level of Indian Posts and Telecommunications Accounts and Finance Service, Group ‘A’

item.title: Department of Telecommunications (DoT): 1 new text block, 2 items no longer on page
item.description:
1 new text block, 2 items no longer on page
New text: भारतीय डाक और दूरसंचार लेखा और वित्त सेवा, समूह 'ए' के कनिष्ठ प्रशासनिक ग्रेड और उससे नीचे के स्तर में स्थानांतरण/नियुक्ति

item.title: Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI): 1 new link, 2 new text blocks
item.description:
1 new link, 2 new text blocks
New text: Consumer Awareness Programm at Oddanchatram ( Tamil Nadu) by CITIZEN CONSUMER CIVIC ACTION GROUP (CCCAG) | Dindigul, Tamil Nadu
New links:
  • Consumer Awareness Programm at Oddanchatram ( Tamil Nadu) by CITIZEN CONSUMER CIVIC ACTION GROUP (CCCAG)

item.title: Ministry of Information & Broadcasting (MIB): 1 new text block
Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY): 2 items no longer on page
Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY): 4 new text blocks, 5 items no longer on page
item.description:
4 new text blocks, 5 items no longer on page
New text: Useful Links | Help | Feedback | This Website belong to Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

item.title: Department of Telecommunications (DoT): 3 items no longer on page
Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY): 2 new links, 3 new text blocks, 5 items no longer on page
item.description:
2 new links, 3 new text blocks, 5 items no longer on page
New text: इलेक्ट्रॉनिक और सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी मंत्रालय द्वारा साझा की गई एक पोस्ट (@goi_meity) | Rate this translation | Submit
New links:
  • इस पोस्ट को इंस्टाग्राम पर देखें
  • View this post on Instagram
